emergency_definition: No heat when outdoor temperature is below 30°F
No AC when outdoor temperature is above 95°F

fallback.action: Inform caller someone will call back within 15 minutes

non_emergency_routing_rules.after_hours: Inform caller of business hours. Offer callback next business day. Collect name and phone number. Mention website: www.arcticcomfortdenver.com

vip_routing.trigger: Caller identifies as existing maintenance contract customer

call_transfer_rules.voicemail_instruction: Send to voicemail. Office checks voicemail regularly.

integration_constraints: Never create, modify, or access jobs in ServiceTitan — all ServiceTitan tasks are handled by office staff only
after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller. Confirm purpose. If emergency trigger identified, collect name, phone, address. Attempt transfer to primary on-call Chris Vega (90s timeout), then Dave Kowalski. If both fail, inform caller of 15-minute callback and alert owner via SMS. If non-emergency, give business hours, collect name/number, and mention website arcticcomfortdenver.com.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller. If caller identifies as existing maintenance contract customer, transfer directly to Janet at 720-555-0111. Otherwise transfer to main office line 720-555-0100. If no answer in 4 rings, send to voicemail.
greeting: Thank you for calling Arctic Comfort HVAC, how can I help you today?
questions_or_unknowns: On-call schedule is rotating weekly — integration for schedule updates not defined
notes: v2 — Mike Salazar replaced by Chris Vega as primary on-call. Water heater replacement and commercial refrigeration maintenance (pilot) added to services. Commercial boiler failure added as emergency trigger. VIP routing for maintenance contract customers to Janet direct line. Website mention added to after-hours non-emergency close.
